root-question.text: Can any tool in the registry return more than N tokens (default 20k)?

question.text: Is scratch storage (local disk, S3, in-proc store) available?
Can a paired read-file tool be exposed to the agent?

branch.conclusion: Install the eviction middleware with threshold N. Expose read_file(path, lines).
Cannot use middleware — raise per-tool hard size caps in tool definitions instead.
Add scratch storage before installing middleware; eviction needs somewhere to write.

example.p: large_payload_possible=true (web scrape) → storage_available=true (local /tmp) → read_tool_addable=true → conclusion: install-middleware.
